history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with messy, spiky black hair is looking directly at the camera. He has dark eyes and a light complexion. He is wearing a black t-shirt. The background is slightly out of focus, but shows a light blue trash can to his left and a black shoe rack filled with various shoes to his right. The lighting appears to be artificial and comes from the front, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and relaxed.
